title: Acronia omoglossa
taxonomy: Acronia omoglossa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Acronia and is a part of the order Gentianales. Acronia omoglossa is a type of tree or shrub native to Southeast Asia. The classification of Acronia omoglossa is further broken down into the family level and higher taxonomic levels. At the highest taxonomic level, Acronia omoglossa is classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
